name: getaibd-chrome-plugin
description: GetAIBD Page Assistant Chrome extension + Gmail MCP server.

scripts.zip: cd extension && rm -f ../getaibd-page-assistant-v1.0.0.zip && zip -r ../getaibd-page-assistant-v1.0.0.zip manifest.json background.js panel.js gmail-bridge.js options.html options.css options.js icons -x '*.DS_Store'
